content.rendered:
Privacy Policy

📅 Last updated: April 23, 2026

1. Introduction

Welcome to Antiquity Illustrated (“we,” “our,” or “us”). Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Italian law (Legislative Decree 196/2003 as amended by Legislative Decree 101/2018).

2. Data Controller

Antiquity Illustrated
Email: privacy@antiquityillustrated.com
This website is operated as a static HTML site hosted on Netlify, located on servers within the European Union (EU).

3. Information We Collect

This website is a static site with no forms, comments, user accounts, or analytics tools. We collect the absolute minimum:

  • Server Logs (via Netlify): Like almost every website, our hosting provider automatically records certain technical information when you visit, including your IP address, browser type, referring pages, pages viewed, and timestamps. IP addresses are considered personal data under GDPR.

4. How We Use Your Information

We use this limited information solely for:

  • Operational purposes – to ensure the site functions correctly.
  • Security purposes – to detect and prevent malicious activity or attacks.

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with any third parties for marketing purposes.

5. Cookies

This website uses no first-party cookies of any kind. For detailed information, please see our Cookie Policy.

6. Third-Party Links

Our site contains links to external websites, including YouTube (the videos we create). When you click a link and leave our site, we are not responsible for the privacy practices of those other websites. We encourage you to read their privacy policies.

7. Your Rights Under GDPR

If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have the following rights:

  • Right to Access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
  • Right to Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate data.
  • Right to Erasure (“Right to be Forgotten”): Request deletion of your data.
  • Right to Restrict Processing: Request limitation of data processing.
  • Right to Data Portability: Request transfer of your data.
  • Right to Object: Object to the processing of your data.

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at privacy@antiquityillustrated.com. We will respond within 30 days.

8. Data Retention

Server logs are retained by Netlify for a short period (typically 30 days) for operational and security purposes. No long-term archiving of personal data occurs.

9. Children’s Privacy

Our website is not directed at children under 14. We do not knowingly collect any personal information from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected such data, please contact us, and we will delete it.

10. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated “last updated” date.

11. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: privacy@antiquityillustrated.com

← Back to Home

© 2026 Antiquity Illustrated – Privacy Policy | Cookie Policy
